name: Yatsen Holding Limited
description: Yatsen Holding Limited is a leading China-based beauty group dedicated to creating an exciting new journey of beauty discovery for consumers worldwide. The company operates a diverse portfolio of beauty brands, including Perfect Diary, Little Ondine, Pink Bear, and various international skincare labels. By leveraging technology-driven innovation and a deep understanding of consumer trends, Yatsen focuses on developing high-quality cosmetics and skincare products. The company is committed to sustainable growth and social responsibility, continuously integrating research and development with green initiatives to empower consumers and communities through its innovative beauty solutions.
